problem id: ece0babd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01000101 -> 01001000
  01110011 -> 11001110
  11011001 -> 01011011
  00110100 -> 00000110
  11000000 -> 00011000
  01101111 -> 11001101
  10001111 -> 11010001
  01111110 -> 10001111

query: 10100110
predicted answer: 10010100
